# DEX by Akif Saeed

> DEX builds production-grade AI agents and business automation for service businesses and enterprises — voice & call agents, conversational chatbots, decision-intelligence agents, multi-agent systems, and workflow automation that run operations 24/7. Founded by Akif Saeed. Vendor-agnostic, built on stacks like Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, LangChain, CrewAI, n8n, and more.

## What DEX builds

- **Voice & call agents** — human-like inbound/outbound calls: appointment booking, lead qualification, and 24/7 phone support (clinic receptionists, support hotlines, sales follow-up).
- **Conversational & chat agents** — natural communication across WhatsApp, website live chat, and messaging for support, onboarding, and engagement.
- **Decision-intelligence agents** — forecast outcomes and recommend next steps from real-time and historical data (sales forecasting, churn prediction, demand planning, risk).
- **Multi-agent systems** — coordinate specialized agents across complex, cross-functional operations as one intelligence layer.
- **Workflow automation agents** — automate repetitive rule-based tasks (CRM updates, invoice processing, employee onboarding, scheduling).
- **Vision & data agents** — extract and validate data from text and images (invoice extraction, document classification, defect detection).

## Why it matters for businesses

DEX turns repetitive business work into reliable AI-assisted workflows. Agents are production-grade and vendor-agnostic — the right enterprise stack is chosen per workflow rather than locking into one tool.

## Blog topics

Practical, source-grounded guides on: the latest AI tools for business, new Claude skills and MCP servers (and how to use Claude for specific tasks), real business pain-points solved with AI/automation, and AI agent / automation deep-dives.

## Contact

Talk with Sarah — DEX's AI partner — directly on the site for an automation consultation. See also: [About](https://dexbyakif.com/about) · [Contact](https://dexbyakif.com/contact).

## Author / expertise
